question: What is the refund policy for premium subscriptions?
answer: Premium subscribers are eligible for a full refund within 30 days of purchase if they have not used more than 10% of their allocated credits.
contexts: Our refund policy allows premium subscribers to request a full refund within 30 days of their initial purchase date.
Refunds are only applicable if the subscriber has consumed less than 10% of their allocated monthly credits.
Refund requests must be submitted through the customer support portal.
ground_truth: Premium subscribers can get a full refund within 30 days if they have used less than 10% of their credits.

question: How does the AI model handle personally identifiable information?
answer: The AI model processes PII data through encrypted channels and does not store any user-identifiable information after the session ends.
contexts: All data transmitted to the AI model is encrypted using AES-256 encryption.
The system is designed with a zero-retention policy — no PII is stored beyond the active session.
Compliance with GDPR and CCPA is maintained through automated data purging at session termination.
ground_truth: PII is encrypted during processing and not retained after the session, in compliance with GDPR and CCPA.

question: What are the SLA commitments for enterprise customers?
answer: Enterprise customers are guaranteed 99.9% uptime with a maximum response time of 200ms for API calls.
contexts: Enterprise SLA guarantees 99.9% uptime measured monthly.
API response time is guaranteed to be under 500ms at the 95th percentile.
ground_truth: Enterprise SLA guarantees 99.9% uptime. API response time is guaranteed under 500ms at p95.
